issue_title: Age of Empires IV: Anniversary Edition (1466860)
compatibility_report:
Age of empires 4 does not work in Spanish

Issue transferred from https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/5282.
@rodrigoGA posted on 2021-11-04T16:10:39:

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Age of empires 4
- Steam AppID of the game: 1466860

## System Information
- GPU:  RTX 3070ti
- Driver/LLVM version:  nvidia-driver-470
- OS: Ubuntu 20.04
- Proton version: Proton experimental

## I confirm:
- [ x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [ x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

Proton log: [steam-1466860.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/7476365/steam-1466860.log)

# Symptoms
The game does not open after I put it in Spanish

## Reproduction

1. Install ubuntu on english.
2. Install steam and age of empires 4
3. Open age of empires 4 and work
4. change the language of the game to Spanish Latinamerica and the game doesn't work anymore,

it shows a black screen, the game mouse is visible, and it closes. I try:
* reinsall the game
* change the os language to spanish
symptom_summary:
用户在将《帝国时代4》的语言设置为西班牙语后，游戏无法启动，出现黑屏，游戏鼠标可见，但随后关闭。 

Tags: Game Crash, Black Screen, Language Issue

issue_title: Sword of the Stars II: Enhanced Edition (42990)
compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report

- Steam AppID of the game: 42990

## System Information
- GPU: Nvidia RTX 3080
- Video driver version: Nvidia 545.29.06
- Kernel version: Linux 6.6.4-200.fc39.x86_64
- Link to full system information report: https://gist.github.com/Asteliks/22ffb3d4313ed996eaf2b8807a43ee35
- Proton version: Proton Experimental (as of 2023/12/08)
- Proton logs: [steam-42990.zip](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/13624097/steam-42990.zip)
- Sword of the Stars II logs: [log-20231209124802.txt](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/13624125/log-20231209124802.txt)


## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
The game opens the luncher but if you start the game it's an instant crash to desktop

## Reproduction
1. Run SOTS2 on steam
2. Edit the game setting however you want or don't
3. Start the game
4. Note a crash to desktop
symptom_summary:
用户在启动《星际之剑 II：增强版》时，能够打开启动器，但一旦尝试开始游戏，便会立即崩溃并返回桌面。

**Tag Suggestions:** Crash, Desktop Exit, Launcher Issue

Tags: Game Crash, Startup Issue, Popup Message

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Ragnarock (VR)
- Steam AppID of the game: 1345820

## System Information
- GPU: GTX 1080
- Driver/LLVM version: NVIDIA 470.57.02
- Kernel version: 5.13.4-zen1-1-zen
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/kubax/2b08a2a7c8f6ab18f0d388f5724ed0f8
- Proton version: 6.3-5 / Experimental

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.
[steam-1345820.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/6862079/steam-1345820.log)

## Symptoms:
Game starts without problems, menu and everything is working as expected (as far as i can tell).

Problem starts while playing a song. At first everything is fine, but in the middle of the song notes start to disapear bevore thay hit the drums. Ship is getting thrown back and forth sometimes with massive speed. Sometimes the ship is stuck and no notes are showing up.

Multiplayer works fine, but given the problems above is not realy competetivly playable. When notes do not show anymore, i can tell that there should be notes, because the other player does see them (on windows and on another headset)


## Reproduction

- start game
- get into solo or pvp mode
- select a song (doesn't matter wich one)
- play the song. notes start to disapear somwhere in the middle of the song. most of the times the notes are back in the last 3rd of the song.
symptom_summary:
用户在玩《Ragnarock (VR)》时遇到的问题包括：在歌曲进行中，音符会在击打鼓之前消失，飞船会出现剧烈的抖动，有时还会卡住并且没有音符显示。尽管多人模式正常，但由于上述问题，游戏体验受到严重影响。

Tag suggestions: Visual Glitches, Gameplay Issues, Multiplayer Problems

Tags: Animation freeze, Low frame rate, Resolution issues

start me1 or me2

Tags: Game Crash, Launcher Works, Unhandled Page Fault

## Symptoms 

```
Unhandled Exception:                       
System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object
  at CrashReporterWindows.Program+<>c.<Main>b__0_0 (CrashReporterCommon.CrashReport+StackFrameReport t) [0x00006] in <d94e0640bed04438be7f54f15f423dae>:0

[ERROR] FATAL UNHANDLED EXCEPTION: System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object
  at CrashReporterWindows.Program+<>c.<Main>b__0_0 (CrashReporterCommon.CrashReport+StackFrameReport t) [0x00006] in <d94e0640bed04438be7f54f15f423dae>:0
```

**Tag Suggestions:** Crash, Unhandled Exception, Null Reference
